task: The insertion condition in cookiejar_from_dict (cookies.py) mixes the overwrite flag with a membership check. Simplify the condition.
correctness_argument: `if overwrite or (name not in names_from_jar):` correctly implements the documented semantics: when `overwrite` is True (the default) all cookies from the dict are set, including replacements; when False only new names are added. Neither the default behaviour nor explicit overwrite=False is silently broken.
